title: Clause Lens
subtitle: Insurance Policy Clause Extractor
problem: Insurance policies are dense PDFs — extracting coverage facts, exclusions, and limits manually is slow, inconsistent, and error-prone.
description: TypeScript/Node.js pipeline that ingests policy PDFs, chunks clauses, extracts structured coverage facts with Claude, and serves semantic search over PostgreSQL + pgvector.
built: Full pipeline: PDF ingest (pdfplumber), clause chunking & classification, concurrent Claude JSON extraction, MiniLM/OpenAI embeddings, pgvector cosine search, labeled eval benchmark, and a built-in web UI.
longDescription: Clause Lens ingests insurance policy PDFs, extracts structured coverage facts using Claude, and serves semantic search over a PostgreSQL + pgvector store — with a built-in web UI for upload, search, and evaluation.
outcome: End-to-end RAG-style policy analyzer with retrieval accuracy targets above 80% and field-level extraction scoring on a labeled benchmark set.

title: arnshop
subtitle: E-Commerce Platform
problem: Needed a complete desktop e-commerce system for selling electronics with inventory and checkout — without relying on third-party storefronts.
description: E-commerce platform selling electronic devices. Built with Java featuring a professional GUI and full shopping cart functionality.
built: A Java Swing application with MySQL backend: product catalog, shopping cart, order management, and admin inventory controls.
longDescription: A complete e-commerce solution for electronic devices. Features product catalog, shopping cart, order management, and an interactive Java GUI.
outcome: Fully functional e-commerce workflow with clean Java architecture and a production-ready desktop UI.

title: webscraping
subtitle: Python Data Extraction
problem: Manual data collection from multi-page websites was slow and error-prone for analysis workflows.
description: Scrapes structured data from websites using Python and BeautifulSoup. Handles multi-page extraction efficiently.
built: A Python pipeline using BeautifulSoup to crawl pages, parse HTML, normalize records, and export structured datasets.
longDescription: A Python web scraping project using BeautifulSoup to extract structured data from multiple pages. Ideal for data collection and analysis pipelines.
outcome: Automated extraction pipeline producing clean structured output suitable for downstream analysis.

title: Handwriting Recognition AI
subtitle: CNN Machine Learning Model
problem: Classifying handwritten digits and text manually does not scale — needed a trained model for automated recognition.
description: AI model using convolutional neural networks to identify and classify handwritten text and digits from large datasets.
built: A CNN in Python with TensorFlow: dataset preprocessing, model training, evaluation metrics, and inference on new samples.
longDescription: Machine learning project implementing CNN architecture for handwriting recognition. Trained on large datasets to classify handwritten digits and text with high accuracy.
outcome: Working classifier with extensible training pipeline and documented accuracy improvements across iterations.

title: mqtt-weather-app
subtitle: IoT Weather Monitoring
problem: Weather sensor data was scattered across devices with no unified real-time view or reliable ingestion path.
description: Weather station monitoring system using MQTT protocol. Python + Flask backend receives sensor data via MQTT subscriptions.
built: Flask API subscribing to MQTT topics, processing sensor payloads, and exposing a live weather dashboard. Dockerized for deployment.
longDescription: IoT weather monitoring application that collects environmental data through MQTT protocol. Built with Python and Flask, processes real-time sensor data from connected weather stations.
outcome: Live MQTT pub/sub pipeline with a working dashboard for environmental monitoring.

title: arnlibrary
subtitle: Library Management System
problem: Small libraries needed a simple system to track books, students, and borrowing without complex enterprise software.
description: Java library management system with book records, student records, and interactive GUI for managing library operations.
built: Java Swing GUI with MySQL persistence for books, students, due dates, and admin operations.
longDescription: Complete Library Management System in Java with GUI. Manages book inventory, student borrowing records, due dates, and administrative operations.
outcome: End-to-end library workflow with CRUD operations and an interactive admin panel.

title: BFS-DFS Algorithms
subtitle: Graph Traversal Implementation
problem: Understanding and comparing graph traversal strategies for pathfinding and connected-component problems.
description: Implementation of Breadth-First Search and Depth-First Search graph traversal algorithms.
built: Java implementations of BFS and DFS with graph representation, traversal logic, and performance comparison.
longDescription: Educational project implementing BFS and DFS graph traversal algorithms with visualization and performance analysis.
outcome: Correct, tested traversal implementations demonstrating algorithm trade-offs.
